title: Gooey Bitter Dutch Uni Roast
description: A rich, savory, and slightly bitter post-workout Dutch dish featuring seared uni and a gooey keto-friendly roast. This dish combines the ocean's finest with a hearty, comforting Dutch flavor profile.
instructions: Season the roast beef with salt, pepper, and a pinch of paprika.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat and sear the roast beef on all sides until browned.
Transfer the roast beef to a plate and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the roast beef fat to the Dutch oven.
Sear the uni on all sides until golden brown.
Return the roast beef to the Dutch oven and cover with a lid.
Bake for 45 minutes, then remove the lid and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Slice the roast beef against the grain and serve with seared uni.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
